(DEVICE FILE: CRYSTAL-4_6_XTAL_3225_4P_20MHZ)

PACKAGE XTAL_3225_4P
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 4

PINORDER 'CRYSTAL-4_6_XTAL_3225_4P_20MHZ' GND GND0 XIN XOUT
PINUSE 'CRYSTAL-4_6_XTAL_3225_4P_20MHZ' POWER POWER UNSPEC UNSPEC
FUNCTION G1 'CRYSTAL-4_6_XTAL_3225_4P_20MHZ' 2 4 1 3

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME 'CRYSTAL-4_6'
PACKAGEPROP VALUE 20MHz

END
